title: OPF Narrative Template
description: Schema for narrative template files in the pptx.dev library. Each template describes a named story arc (e.g. 'problem-solution', 'scqa') as an ordered list of beats. Templates are referenced from OPF documents via meta.narrative.template.

id.description: Stable slug used by OPF documents to reference this template, e.g. 'problem-solution'. Lowercase kebab-case.

summary.description: One-sentence description of when and why to use this narrative.

audienceFit.description: Audiences this narrative works well for, e.g. ['executives', 'investors', 'customers'].

durationRange.description: Typical talk-length window this narrative suits.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and search, e.g. ['business', 'pitch', 'internal'].

beats.description: Ordered list of beats that make up the narrative arc.

Beat.description: A single narrative beat — a labeled segment of the story arc with a specific dramatic purpose. Mirrors the NarrativeBeat definition in opf.schema.json so library entries and inline OPF beats are interchangeable.

id.description: Stable slug used by Slide.beat to reference this beat. Lowercase kebab-case.

description.description: What this beat should accomplish. Used as a prompt for AI-driven generation of slides assigned to this beat.

slideCount.description: Optional explicit slide count for this beat. Defaults to 1 when omitted; values >1 are reserved for beats that intentionally span multiple slides. Prefer decomposing a heavy beat into multiple beats over setting a high slideCount.

layoutHint.description: Suggested layout for the opening slide of this beat, e.g. 'section-divider', 'title-slide'.
